regions.us-ports: Today, Miami experiences clear skies with a southeast wind of 8kt and less than 10% rain probability. Heat Advisory in effect for New Orleans (heat index up to 115°F) and Galveston and Houston (heat index up to 115°F); Extreme Heat Warning in effect for New Orleans (heat index up to 115°F) and Galveston and Houston (heat index up to 115°F). Over the next 48 hours and beyond, southeast winds of 11-14kt with overcast conditions and less than 10% rain probability are expected to impact Port Everglades and Port Canaveral.
regions.bahamas-central-caribbean: Today, with clear skies and less than 10% rain probability, cruise ship operations in Nassau are expected to proceed normally. By Day 3, as thunderstorms develop with a 27% rain probability and E 15kt winds, port operations in Nassau could be impacted.

Beyond 48 hours, Belize City will see continued elevated heat with a heat index reaching 100F, as ENE 8kt winds and drizzle persist under less than 10% rain probability.
